famous quote:
Be kind for everyone you meet is fighting a hard battle.
-Ian MacLaren, 1897
Interview Text:
Karen:

Karen was in our small group and has experience with supernatural prayer. Here's what she told me. 

We always pray demons away with more than one person. Hopefully with someone who has known the person for a while. We pray for them before we do anything. Then we pray to send the other spirits away and bring in Jesus.

But to do this I have to know who God is, and the authority God has given us, and know the power of what I'm dealing with. We can't play around with it. 

One time my son Nathan wanted cigarettes. I took him to the store, he got carded, and his anger was over the top. I didn't take the time to forgive him. The next week I went to a worship seminar. At the end of service (of 200 people) the worship leader asked me to stand up when everybody sat down. 

"You are having troubles with your thoughts," he said. 

I replied, "Yes, I am." 

He said to the group we need to pray for her, it's too big for her to handle by herself. Several people sat beside me and were praying in tongues. A minute or so later, I was thrown back into my chair, and something left. 

My daughter Sarah was part of a traveling singing program. One night, at one of those concerts, I had a huge headache. Nathan could speak in tongues at the time, and he understood more about the supernatural world. "Let me pray for you," he said. I was like, "Whatever." He started praying in tongues. I felt something like claws grab me, dig into my shoulders. That's when I agreed to let him pray it away from me. In situations like that, just pray through it. Say "In the name of Jesus, GO!" Say the name of Jesus first. That is the key thing to do. 

What the enemies want to do is bring fear. 

Now if I am out and feel good, if I start not to feel good, I'm sensitive enough to know that maybe something has tried to ride home with me. That's when I pray it away.

Another time we had just finished one of Sarah's performances, and when I got into the car, it felt like someone was choking me. We prayed "In the name of Jesus," and it stopped. This has happened three times. 

You can't have a formula. You have to have your senses trained to sense good and evil. You can't hold any anger toward people. Eph 4:27 says don't give the devil a toe-hold. Does that make sense that he has toes? Maybe that is what was clawing me.

Jesus tells his disciples to cast out spirits. Luke 10:19 says overcome all the power of the enemy, but rejoice that your names are written in the book of life. 

Here are a couple other little tidbits Karen shared with me: 

The witch in "The Lion, Witch and the Wardrobe" turned into a stump or boulder when they were trying to battle her.

Joyce Myers says the greatest spiritual warfare weapon is love. 

It is very bad to go to mediums. King Saul sinned by going to Endor to call forth dead Samuel.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine if God's love for us, and ours for him was like this.
